title: lobelia gelida
intro: Lobelia gelida, also known as Arctic Lobelia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Arctic regions of North America. Traditionally, Lobelia gelida has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, which help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is rich in health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Lobelia gelida can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are available over-the-counter, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
